label: Terrain Def
description: Defines a terrain tile type placed on the map, such as soil, stone, water, road surfaces, or constructed floors.

texturePath.label: Texture path
texturePath.description: Texture asset path used as the primary terrain tile graphic.

edgeType.label: Edge type
edgeType.description: Controls how this terrain blends with adjacent terrain at its borders.

customShader.label: Custom shader
customShader.description: ShaderTypeDef override for rendering this terrain instead of the default terrain shader.

customShaderParameters.label: Custom shader parameters
customShaderParameters.description: Named shader property overrides passed to the custom shader. Each child element name is a shader property identifier.

waterDepthShader.label: Water depth shader
waterDepthShader.description: ShaderTypeDef used for the underwater depth rendering pass.

waterDepthShaderParameters.label: Water depth shader parameters
waterDepthShaderParameters.description: Named shader property overrides for the water depth shader. Each child element name is a shader property identifier.

renderPrecedence.label: Render precedence
renderPrecedence.description: Integer sort order for this terrain when determining which tile draws on top at a shared edge. Higher values draw over lower values.

affordances.label: Affordances
affordances.description: TerrainAffordanceDef references describing what can be built or done on this terrain.

layerable.label: Layerable
layerable.description: If true, constructed floors can be placed on top of this terrain.

scatterType.label: Scatter type
scatterType.description: String identifier used to look up scatter thingDefs that can spawn naturally on this terrain.

takeFootprints.label: Take footprints
takeFootprints.description: If true, pawns walking on this terrain leave footprint flecks.

natural.label: Natural
natural.description: If true, this terrain is considered a natural surface rather than a constructed floor.

takeSplashes.label: Take splashes
takeSplashes.description: If true, projectiles and rain produce splash effects when hitting this terrain.

avoidWander.label: Avoid wander
avoidWander.description: If true, wandering pawns prefer not to walk onto this terrain.

changeable.label: Changeable
changeable.description: If true, this terrain can be replaced by construction or terraforming.

smoothedTerrain.label: Smoothed terrain
smoothedTerrain.description: TerrainDef this terrain becomes when a pawn smooths it.

gravshipReplacementTerrain.label: Gravship replacement terrain
gravshipReplacementTerrain.description: TerrainDef placed under gravship hull sections when the ship lands on this terrain.

holdSnowOrSand.label: Hold snow or sand
holdSnowOrSand.description: If true, snow and sand accumulate on this terrain.

isPaintable.label: Is paintable
isPaintable.description: If true, players can recolor this floor with the paint tool.

extinguishesFire.label: Extinguishes fire
extinguishesFire.description: If true, fire cannot burn on this terrain and is extinguished when it touches it.

color.label: Color
color.description: Tint color applied to this terrain's texture. Accepts integer (0–255) or float (0–1) RGBA components.

colorDef.label: Color def
colorDef.description: ColorDef whose color is applied as the tint for this terrain.

driesTo.label: Dries to
driesTo.description: TerrainDef this terrain converts to when it dries out (e.g. mud drying to soil).

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: String tags used to match this terrain in map generation or other systems.

burnedDef.label: Burned def
burnedDef.description: TerrainDef this terrain becomes after being burned.

tools.label: Tools
tools.description: Melee attack capabilities for pawns fighting on or interacting with this terrain.

extraDeteriorationFactor.label: Extra deterioration factor
extraDeteriorationFactor.description: Multiplier on the deterioration rate of items left on this terrain. 1.0 means no change.

destroyOnBombDamageThreshold.label: Destroy on bomb damage threshold
destroyOnBombDamageThreshold.description: Minimum single-hit bomb damage required to destroy this terrain tile. -1 disables destruction.

destroyBuildingsOnDestroyed.label: Destroy buildings on destroyed
destroyBuildingsOnDestroyed.description: If true, buildings on this terrain cell are also destroyed when the terrain is destroyed.

traversedThought.label: Traversed thought
traversedThought.description: ThoughtDef mood effect applied to a pawn each time it walks over this terrain.

extraDraftedPerceivedPathCost.label: Extra drafted perceived path cost
extraDraftedPerceivedPathCost.description: Additional path cost used by drafted pawns when evaluating movement over this terrain.

extraNonDraftedPerceivedPathCost.label: Extra non-drafted perceived path cost
extraNonDraftedPerceivedPathCost.description: Additional path cost used by non-drafted pawns when evaluating movement over this terrain.

destroyEffect.label: Destroy effect
destroyEffect.description: EffecterDef played when this terrain is destroyed on dry ground.

destroyEffectWater.label: Destroy effect water
destroyEffectWater.description: EffecterDef played when this terrain is destroyed over water.

autoRebuildable.label: Auto rebuildable
autoRebuildable.description: If true, the game will automatically schedule reconstruction of this terrain after it is destroyed.

categoryType.label: Category type
categoryType.description: Broad terrain category used for pathfinding heuristics and map generation grouping.

meltSnowRadius.label: Melt snow radius
meltSnowRadius.description: Radius in cells around each tile of this terrain in which snow is prevented from accumulating.

heatPerTick.label: Heat per tick
heatPerTick.description: Heat energy in joules added to the room atmosphere per game tick by each tile of this terrain.

igniteRadius.label: Ignite radius
igniteRadius.description: Radius in cells in which this terrain can start fires on adjacent terrain and objects.

ignitePawnsIntervalTicks.label: Ignite pawns interval ticks
ignitePawnsIntervalTicks.description: Tick interval at which pawns standing on this terrain are set on fire. 0 means never.

burnDamage.label: Burn damage
burnDamage.description: Damage per burn interval dealt to pawns walking over this terrain while it is on fire.

burnIntervalTicks.label: Burn interval ticks
burnIntervalTicks.description: Tick interval between burn damage applications to pawns on this terrain.

supportsRock.label: Supports rock
supportsRock.description: If true, natural rock formations can generate on top of this terrain.

toxicBuildupFactor.label: Toxic buildup factor
toxicBuildupFactor.description: Multiplier on the rate at which pawns accumulate toxic buildup while standing on this terrain.

dontRender.label: Don't render
dontRender.description: If true, this terrain tile is not drawn on the map (used for special-purpose invisible terrain).

exposesToVacuum.label: Exposes to vacuum
exposesToVacuum.description: If true, rooms with this terrain on their boundary are treated as exposed to vacuum.

canFreeze.label: Can freeze
canFreeze.description: If true, this terrain can freeze into ice terrain when the temperature drops sufficiently.

dangerous.label: Dangerous
dangerous.description: If true, pawns will avoid this terrain when possible and log a warning when forced onto it.

preventCraters.label: Prevent craters
preventCraters.description: If true, explosion craters cannot form on this terrain.

canEverTerraform.label: Can ever terraform
canEverTerraform.description: If true, this terrain can be changed by terraforming operations such as fertilizer pumps.

waterBodyType.label: Water body type
waterBodyType.description: Classifies the body of water for fishing, pathfinding, and world generation purposes.

cropIcon.label: Crop icon
cropIcon.description: If true, an icon indicating suitable growing conditions is shown over this terrain in the growing zone UI.

glowRadius.label: Glow radius
glowRadius.description: Radius in cells of the light emitted by this terrain.

glowColor.label: Glow color
glowColor.description: Color of the light emitted by this terrain. Accepts integer (0–255) or float (0–1) RGBA components.

throwFleckChance.label: Throw fleck chance
throwFleckChance.description: Per-tick probability (0–1) that a fleck particle is emitted from this terrain cell.

fleckData.label: Fleck data
fleckData.description: Configuration for the fleck particle emitted by this terrain.

isFoundation.label: Is foundation
isFoundation.description: If true, this terrain acts as a structural foundation that supports buildings above it.

bridge.label: Bridge
bridge.description: If true, this terrain is treated as a bridge surface for movement and construction rules.

bridgePropsPath.label: Bridge props path
bridgePropsPath.description: Texture asset path for the bridge structural props graphic drawn over standard terrain.

spaceBridgePropsPath.label: Space bridge props path
spaceBridgePropsPath.description: Texture asset path for the space bridge structural props graphic.

temporary.label: Temporary
temporary.description: If true, this terrain is temporary and will be removed after a set duration or trigger.

tempTerrain.label: Temp terrain
tempTerrain.description: Properties controlling removal behavior for temporary terrain.

floodTerrain.label: Flood terrain
floodTerrain.description: TerrainDef this terrain converts to when flooded by water.

canBePolluted.label: Can be polluted
canBePolluted.description: If true, this terrain can become polluted terrain (Biotech DLC).

pollutedTexturePath.label: Polluted texture path
pollutedTexturePath.description: Texture asset path used when this terrain is in its polluted state.

pollutionOverlayTexturePath.label: Pollution overlay texture path
pollutionOverlayTexturePath.description: Texture asset path for the scrolling pollution overlay drawn on top of polluted terrain.

pollutionShaderType.label: Pollution shader type
pollutionShaderType.description: ShaderTypeDef used when rendering this terrain in its polluted state.

pollutionColor.label: Pollution color
pollutionColor.description: Tint color applied to the polluted terrain texture. Accepts integer (0–255) or float (0–1) RGBA components.

pollutionOverlayScrollSpeed.label: Pollution overlay scroll speed
pollutionOverlayScrollSpeed.description: UV scroll speed of the pollution overlay texture as (x, y).

pollutionOverlayScale.label: Pollution overlay scale
pollutionOverlayScale.description: UV tiling scale of the pollution overlay texture as (x, y).

pollutionCloudColor.label: Pollution cloud color
pollutionCloudColor.description: Color of the pollution cloud effect rendered above polluted terrain. Accepts integer (0–255) or float (0–1) RGBA components.

pollutionTintColor.label: Pollution tint color
pollutionTintColor.description: Secondary tint color applied to the pollution overlay. Accepts integer (0–255) or float (0–1) RGBA components.

generatedFilth.label: Generated filth
generatedFilth.description: ThingDef for the filth type that spawns naturally on this terrain.

filthAcceptanceMask.label: Filth acceptance mask
filthAcceptanceMask.description: FilthSourceFlags list controlling which sources of filth can accumulate on this terrain.

spaceEdgeGraphicData.label: Space edge graphic data
spaceEdgeGraphicData.description: Texture configuration for space-edge rendering variants (Odyssey DLC).
